// purpose: Open markdown files (lessons, READMEs, etc.) directly in preview instead of splitting source + preview. Applies only to the kingdom-course window — the learner's own kingdom repo keeps the default source view, which is what he wants when editing his journal.
// to view source instead: Right-click the editor tab -> 'Reopen Editor With...' -> 'Text Editor'. Or Ctrl+Shift+P -> 'View: Reopen Editor With...'.
